title: RumViewUpdateEvent
description: Schema of all properties of a View Update event (partial view update containing only changed fields)

view.description: View properties (only fields that changed since the last view event)

loading_time.description: Duration in ns to the view is considered loaded

network_settled_time.description: Duration in ns from the moment the view was started until all the initial network requests settled

interaction_to_next_view_time.description: Duration in ns to from the last interaction on previous view to the moment the current view was displayed

time_spent.description: Time spent on the view in ns

first_contentful_paint.description: Duration in ns to the first rendering (deprecated in favor of view.performance.fcp.timestamp)

largest_contentful_paint.description: Duration in ns to the largest contentful paint (deprecated in favor of view.performance.lcp.timestamp)

largest_contentful_paint_target_selector.description: CSS selector path of the largest contentful paint element

first_input_delay.description: Duration in ns of the first input event delay (deprecated)

first_input_time.description: Duration in ns to the first input (deprecated)

first_input_target_selector.description: CSS selector path of the first input target element (deprecated)

interaction_to_next_paint.description: Longest duration in ns between an interaction and the next paint (deprecated)

interaction_to_next_paint_time.description: Duration in ns between start of the view and start of the INP (deprecated)

interaction_to_next_paint_target_selecto.description: CSS selector path of the interacted element corresponding to INP (deprecated)

cumulative_layout_shift.description: Total layout shift score that occurred on the view (deprecated)

cumulative_layout_shift_time.description: Duration in ns between start of the view and start of the largest layout shift contributing to CLS (deprecated)

cumulative_layout_shift_target_selector.description: CSS selector path of the first element of the largest layout shift contributing to CLS (deprecated)

dom_complete.description: Duration in ns to the complete parsing and loading of the document and its sub resources

dom_content_loaded.description: Duration in ns to the complete parsing and loading of the document without its sub resources

dom_interactive.description: Duration in ns to the end of the parsing of the document

load_event.description: Duration in ns to the end of the load event handler execution

first_byte.description: Duration in ns to the response start of the document request

custom_timings.description: User custom timings of the view

is_active.description: Whether the View corresponding to this event is considered active

action.description: Properties of the actions of the view

count.description: Number of actions that occurred on the view

error.description: Properties of the errors of the view

count.description: Number of errors that occurred on the view

long_task.description: Properties of the long tasks of the view

count.description: Number of long tasks that occurred on the view

resource.description: Properties of the resources of the view

count.description: Number of resources that occurred on the view

frustration.description: Properties of the frustrations of the view

count.description: Number of frustrations that occurred on the view

max_depth.description: Distance between the top and the lowest point reached on this view (in pixels)

max_depth_scroll_top.description: Page scroll top when the maximum scroll depth was reached (in pixels)

max_scroll_height.description: Maximum page scroll height for this view (in pixels)

max_scroll_height_time.description: Duration between the view start and the time the max scroll height was reached (in nanoseconds)

document_version.description: Version of the update of the view event

records_count.description: The number of records produced during this view lifetime

segments_count.description: The number of segments sent during this view lifetime

segments_total_raw_size.description: The total size in bytes of the segments sent during this view lifetime

configuration.description: Subset of the SDK configuration options in use during its execution

start_session_replay_recording_manually.description: Whether session replay recording configured to start manually
